title: Verdict Ledger
description: An append-only array of QA-gate verdicts and lifecycle steps, each entry recording one step against one artifact. The session Verdict Ledger (a Progress Record under .excn/progress/, ADR-0008) is one such array; a sprint record's step_log carries the same entries by referencing #/$defs/entry, so the shape is defined once. Distinct from progress.schema.json, which shapes a unit-of-work tracker (current_step, paused_at, blockers) rather than a bare verdict array.

step.description: Step name, e.g. code_standards_pass or alignment_review_fail.

artifact.description: What was reviewed (paths, issue IDs, or a short label).

summary.description: The verdict and its reason, e.g. PASS — 0 violations.
